overview.description: Global networking and cybersecurity leader with a major AI/ML research hub in Prague (Cognitive Intelligence team)
overview.description_long: Cisco is a global technology leader in networking, cybersecurity, and collaboration. In Prague, Cisco operates its Cognitive Intelligence team — formerly Cognitive Threat Analytics (CTA) — focused on applying machine learning and AI to detect advanced cyber threats, malware, and anomalous network behavior. The Prague team grew out of Cisco's 2013 acquisition of Cognitive Security, a Prague-based AI cybersecurity startup. The Cognitive Intelligence engine is integrated into Cisco's broader security portfolio including Cisco Secure and Umbrella.

history.origin_story: Founded in 1984 in San Jose, California. Prague AI presence traces to the 2013 acquisition of Cognitive Security, a Czech ML-based cybersecurity startup, which became the foundation for Cisco's Cognitive Threat Analytics (later Cognitive Intelligence) team.

key_milestones.event: Cisco founded in San Jose, California
Acquired Cognitive Security (Prague) — AI-based network threat detection startup
Partnership with Czech Technical University on cybersecurity research
Prague team rebranded as Cognitive Threat Analytics (CTA)
CTA rebranded as Cognitive Intelligence; integrated into Cisco Security portfolio
Foundation AI team released open-source reasoning model for cybersecurity

leadership.name: Martin Rehák
leadership.role: Co-founder of Cognitive Security (acquired); former leader of Prague AI team

notable_people.name: Michal Pěchouček
notable_people.role: Co-founder of Cognitive Security; formerly CTO/AI lead at Prague team

metadata.notes: Cisco is a globally publicly traded US enterprise (NASDAQ: CSCO). The Prague entry in the CNAIP AI catalog refers specifically to Cisco's Cognitive Intelligence (AI/ML cybersecurity) team at Charles Square Center, Pujmanové 1753/10a, Prague. This team originated from the 2013 acquisition of Prague-based Cognitive Security. The Czech legal entity is 'CISCO SYSTEMS (Czech Republic) s.r.o.' Employee count shown is for the global company; Prague office likely has several hundred employees. Revenue figure is global FY2024 public revenue.
